name: License To Clone
short_description: License To Clone is a challenging Open World Sandbox Survival RPG where you learn through survival. Explore a desert with a dynamic economy full of rogue factions. Experiment with powerful mutations. Tame creatures and extract powerful body parts to splice your DNA in your cloning lab.
detailed_description:
License To Clone is a challenging Open World Sandbox Survival RPG, created to explore science fiction scenarios in a huge open world, where every decision, every action and every non-action has consequences.

The game is designed as an open world sandbox where no correct way to play exists, opening up the game to your own exploration, experimentation and discovery.

The factions, towns and characters within the world are all impacted by the players decisions.

  • Play in a huge open world of 4 million tiles, no loading screens.

  • Build anywhere and everywhere to help survive, but watch out not to trespass

  • Many challenges and dangers, including huge killer mantis, the deadly desert sun and spliced mutated clones running rampant.

  • Tame creatures or rescue fellow clones, grow your squad or stay solo

  • Over 22 unique species with different traits and abilities

  • Founders are the ruling humanoids with huge health pools and the ability to build using money

  • Mutated clones are failed clones which have unlocked physical and mental mutations, some with the ability to control other peoples minds.

  • Manage the temperament of creatures and tame them by dropping their favourite food

  • Dynamic quests from squad members to help grow loyalty and learn more about your travelling companions

  • Balance adventure with relaxing time, ensuring your squads morale doesn't drop too low which can result in splitting up your team

  • Every creature has unique species traits, abilities, mutations and body parts

  • Experiment on the splicing table to remove powerful body parts such as the phoenix beak which provides the wearer with intermittent fire breathe

  • Equip powerful body parts as makeshift weapons, or for their useful traits

  • Use mutations to peer into locked containers, send enemies to sleep, and much much more

  • Extract the DNA and mutations of powerful creatures

  • Combine DNA into different spliced creatures, combining the best of two species

  • Use the cloning pods to create countless creatures

  • Build an automated lab, which grows clones and destroys them for their resources

  • Several main factions with differing laws, religions and leaders

  • Choose to ally or become enemies with any faction

  • Kill faction leaders and see their town become taken over by their enemies

  • Grow your own faction and become emperor by defeating the current emperor

  • Trade with town shopkeepers, the armourer, survivalist or black market shops

  • Be a sneaky thief and hack into shops supplies to steal them

  • Decrease or increase the economy of a town through countless selling and mining seeing the town change dynamically

  • Shape the desert by defeating town leaders to change what species are spawning there. Ever seen a town run by cats?

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Turkish, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil
